economic_notes: Band operates video lottery terminals, bingo hall, convenience stores and gas bars through incorporated entities. Kespuwick Resources manages fisheries operations. 3321702 NS Ltd. operates Tru By Hilton hotel in Yarmouth. FNFA debenture of $16,527,000 used to finance Tru Hotel and Hammonds Plains retail store/office. Weliankweyasimk Women's Shelter under construction in Hammonds Plains. Two Rapid Housing Initiative projects with CMHC for modular homes.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 7 fully controlled enterprises: Your Winner's World – AFN Ltd., Medway Entertainment – AFN, The Gold Nugget – AFN Ltd., Kespuwick Fisheries Incorporated, AFN Entertainment Centre/Winner's Corner – AFN, Hammonds Plains Entertainment AFN, and 3321702 NS Ltd. Outstanding CRA HST dispute with assessed taxes, penalties and interest totalling approximately $9,071,370 across Band and subsidiary; partial relief granted and $25,000/month repayment plan in place; $536,438 remains on balance sheet. Band operates 33 CMHC subsidized housing units. FNFA debenture secured by Provincial Gaming Revenues. ISC funding calculated as amount recognized from deferred revenue schedule ($5,255,237). Total government transfers include ISC recognized ($5,255,237) + CMHC recognized ($3,121,642) + Provincial ($276,909) + Environment Climate Change Canada receivable noted but not separately broken out as transfer line. Remuneration schedule referenced on page 38 but not included in provided text.
